description: Shared types for the Muni Town arbiter protocol.

arbiterDid.description: DID of an arbiter (a permissioned space manager).

spaceKey.description: Key (name) of a space within an arbiter. The special key '$admin' controls access to the arbiter itself.

access.description: Access level for a member in a permissioned space. Higher levels include all lower levels.

readMemberList.description: Can read the member list, but no other access and won't be included in the permissioned space's member list.

isMember.description: Member can read records in the space.

addMembers.description: Can add new members with permissions equal to or less than their own.

removeMembers.description: Can remove members with equal or lower permission.

configureSpace.description: Can change the space's configuration and write records to the space's permissioned repo under the arbiter's account.

createSpaces.description: Can create new spaces. Only effective if granted in a space delegated to by the $admin space.

removeSpace.description: Can delete a space. If granted in $admin space, can delete any space.

owner.description: Unlimited permissions — can remove other admins and owners.

memberUser.description: A user member, identified by DID.

memberLocalSpace.description: A local space delegation — all members of the referenced space inherit its access.

memberRemoteSpace.description: A remote space reference — delegates to a space on another arbiter.

spaceId.description: Fully-qualified reference to a space on a specific arbiter.

publicRecords.description: Whether records in the space can be read without being a member.

publicMembers.description: Whether the member list can be queried without being a member.

resolvedMemberList.description: A fully-resolved member list for a space, plus any spaces that could not be resolved.

memberList.description: Resolved user DIDs mapped to their effective access level. JSON object where keys are user DIDs and values are access level tokens (e.g. "town.muni.arbiter#owner").

missingSpaces.description: Spaces that could not be resolved, mapped to the access level that would have been inherited. JSON object where keys are space IDs ("{arbiterDid}:{spaceKey}") and values are access level tokens.

arbiterError.description: Error kinds that can be returned by the arbiter state machine.

errJobIdAlreadyUsed.description: The job ID is already in use.

errJobNotExists.description: The referenced job does not exist.

errSpaceNotNeeded.description: The job does not need this space to be resolved.

errSpaceAlreadyResolved.description: The space has already been resolved for this job.

errSpaceAlreadyExists.description: A space with this key already exists on this arbiter.

errSpaceNotExists.description: The referenced space does not exist.

errPermissionDenied.description: The user does not have sufficient permissions.

errMemberNotExist.description: The referenced member does not exist in the space.

errPermissionChanged.description: The arbiter state changed since the job was started (version mismatch).

errArbiterDeletionMustSpecifyAdminSpace.description: Arbiter deletion must target the $admin space.

errWriteOperationAlreadyInProgress.description: A write operation from this user is already in progress.

errRemoteSpaceReferencesLocalArbiter.description: A remote space member references the local arbiter — use a local space member instead.

errOnlyLastOwnerCanDeleteArbiter.description: The arbiter can only be deleted when there is a single owner in the $admin space.

errJobsTimedOut.description: One or more jobs timed out to avoid version collision.

serverError.description: Error kinds returned by the arbiter server.

errArbiterAlreadyExists.description: An arbiter with this DID already exists on this server.

errArbiterNotExists.description: No arbiter with this DID exists on this server.

errDuplicateReqId.description: A request with this ID is already being processed.
